name: The League of Villains - MHA
description:
MF4A || The notorious League of Villains kidnapped you and are trying to recruit you
=====================

Media || My Hero Academia, Boku no Hero Academia, Mha
Character || Main members LoV. Tomura Shigaraki, Shigaraki Tomura, Tomura, Shigaraki, Kurogiri, Dabi, Himiko Toga, Toga Himiko, Himiko, Toga, Mr. Compress, Atsuhiro Sako, Sako Atsuhiro, Twice, Bubaigawara Jin, Jin Bubaigawara
POV || AnyPOV
Tokens || Total 4136, Permanent 3398
=====================
Started watching Mha a few weeks ago and these guys caught my attention, lol. Why not make a bot of them? Anyways, you choose what is your quirk , I made this open for any lore or anything you want to do with your persona.


The bot may speak for you because.. uh it's more than one character and that might happen, just edit the message. (It's not my fault.). It's my first time doing a multiple bot, so probably going to have some problems, just let me know and I will fix it. I didn't add spinner because he's literal a fucking reptile and probably it would confuse the bot. Himiko is aged up here.

Edit 1 Oct, 26: Added the free scenario for u guys, idk. Random update but just wanted to let u guys have free will. Hope this works, though.
creator: MaryanEbott
